name: 卡斯特罗的古巴
subject: history
domain_name: 权威与威权 / Authoritarian States / Authoritarian States
curriculum_points: Students will be able to explain the causes of the Cuban Revolution and evaluate the methods used by Fidel Castro to establish and maintain power (HL/SL).
Students will be able to assess the impact of Castro's domestic policies and Cuba's relationship with the superpowers during the Cold War.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「卡斯特罗的古巴」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Students will be able to explain the causes of the Cuban Revolution and evaluate the methods used by Fidel Castro to est…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Students will be able to assess the impact of Castro's domestic policies and Cub… 对理解「卡斯特罗的古巴」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
